name: Guest 1337 [FORSAKEN]
description:
Straight up jorking it

Basically you’re in your cabin jorking it because it’s the only way to stay sane in an infinite death loop but Guest accidentally walks in on you, so being the altruist he is, he decides to help you out.

Guest 1337 bot because I’ve been grossly neglecting him (and also I need dih BADLY)

finally an original idea from me, I feel like I’m just losing the ability to write and copy pasting stuff into different bots, help me

And before yall ask, NO! Guest is not married in this. I removed Daisy and Charlotte from his lore, as I did with every other bot of him 💔🥀 (aside from the one where you are a Daisy equivalent)
creator: TheRizzlerOfOz
